overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-lit waterfront district. The player character walks along a covered promenade past shops and NPCs, descends to a wooden dock area, and explores the industrial waterfront with views of the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with shops and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered waterfront promenade, passing various storefronts and NPCs

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench looking at phone
walking toward camera wearing red jacket and sunglasses

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shelter from rain
storefront with bright yellow signage reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP'
large concrete overpass structure with red lighting underneath
metal railing separating walkway from water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-sheltered waterfront promenade lined with neon signs and shops. The El Dorado Pawn Shop is visible on the left while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. An elevated highway structure looms in the distance on the right, and the area is lit by pink and teal neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairway descending to lower dock level

events.description: leaving covered promenade and beginning descent down wooden stairs to waterfront dock

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down wet wooden stairs to reach the lower dock platform

entered.detail: wet wooden stairs with metal railings leading down to the dock
green metal handrails along the stairway
open wooden platform at water level with industrial equipment

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the covered promenade down a wet wooden stairway to the lower dock level. The area is exposed to the rain with teal ambient lighting illuminating the stairs. No pedestrians are present on the stairs, and the lower dock platform becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront dock with industrial cargo and water access

events.description: rain becomes heavier on the exposed dock, creating reflective puddles on wooden planks
turning slightly to view the water and distant industrial cranes

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet wooden dock, observing the industrial waterfront and water reflections

notable_agents.action: group of dock workers standing near cargo containers

entered.detail: dark water with neon reflections from the city lights
stacked industrial containers and barrels on the dock
large red industrial crane visible across the water
distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exploring the open waterfront dock area fully exposed to the rain. The wooden planks are wet and reflective, with cargo containers to the left and dark water to the right. Industrial cranes and the distant city skyline are visible across the water, while a few NPCs walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with dense cyberpunk cityscape view

events.description: panning camera upward and around to view the towering neon-lit buildings and industrial structures
approaching the stairway ramp to return to the upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: slowly panning to take in the massive cyberpunk cityscape with neon signs and industrial architecture

entered.detail: dense cluster of stacked cyberpunk buildings with multiple levels and neon signage
metal scaffolding and pipes connecting building structures
giant screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Panning around the industrial waterfront to view the impressive cyberpunk cityscape. Multi-tiered buildings with dense neon signage and industrial scaffolding dominate the view. The camera moves toward a ramp leading back to the upper level, with large digital billboards illuminating the rainy night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, neon-lit promenade down into an exposed industrial waterfront under a rainy night sky. It begins by moving past the El Dorado Pawn Shop and various pedestrians along a covered walkway illuminated by pink and teal advertisements. As the camera leaves the shelter, it descends a wet wooden stairway, transitioning from the vibrant shopfronts into a teal-lit descent toward the lower docks. The scene then opens onto a rain-slicked wooden platform flanked by cargo containers and dark water, where the view expands to reveal industrial cranes and a distant skyline. Finally, the camera pans across the multi-tiered cyberpunk cityscape and its dense neon signage before turning toward a ramp leading back to the upper level beneath glowing digital billboards.
